channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY рҹӘҡ Building my own container house вҡ’пёҸ Owner Builder Learning as I go рҹ’Ә

item.title: How much my timber mill cost VS how much IвҖҷm saving by not buy...
item.description:
View on TikTok


How much my timber mill cost VS how much IвҖҷm saving by not buying timber рҹ’°рҹӘө

item.title: Easiest and most fun $6k - $8k IвҖҷve ever saved рҹҳқ For refere...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Easiest and most fun $6k - $8k IвҖҷve ever saved рҹҳқ For reference IвҖҷll be using these logs in my house as posts for the areas where I am making big cut outs or removing entire walls (thereвҖҷs currently acroprops in their place at the moment ) IвҖҷll also be using them for the porch roof IвҖҷll be building around my container house over my wrap around deck рҹҳҚ

item.title: Rusty old marketplace fail вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”> Brand new shed! ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Rusty old marketplace fail вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”> Brand new shed! With just a little bit of elbow grease added along the way рҹҳқ

item.title: This 1 tonne log was a worthy competitor for the Delica, even ra...
item.description:
View on TikTok


This 1 tonne log was a worthy competitor for the Delica, even raising one of its tyres at one stage! рҹҳқрҹӨҰвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ But the Delica held and I got up this giant Marri beast onto the timber mill and milled into slabs for counter tops and tables! The plan is to have Jarrah on the exterior of the house for decking etc and Marri on the interior of the house for posts and beams and so on! рҹҳҚрҹӘө

item.title: My jaw almost hit the floor when I started getting quotes back f...
item.description:
View on TikTok


My jaw almost hit the floor when I started getting quotes back for windows! рҹӨҜ I knew straight away I needed to come up with a solution because if I had to pay over $70kAUD not including delivery or installation then I wouldnвҖҷt have a house to put them in. рҹӨӯ The saying вҖҳthey donвҖҷt make them like they use toвҖҷ rings very true to my experience in this world, So really it was a pretty easy decision for me to go with second hand antique Jarrah timber windows рҹӘҹ IвҖҷm making all my decking boards from Jarrah on my property so the windows will match in beautifully and itвҖҷs such a high quality timber so if I restore them correctly they have another 50-100 years left in them! and with Jarrah being so expensive these days I feel very luxe too рҹҳӮрҹҳқ

item.title: Who would have thought this log was heavier than my quad рҹӨӯрҹҳ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Who would have thought this log was heavier than my quad рҹӨӯрҹҳӮ Getting this 400kg Jarrah log up onto my timber mill and milled may not have been easy but the bench tops IвҖҷm getting from it are definitely worth it рҹҳҚ

item.title: Do I regret buying this shed off marketplace without viewing it ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Do I regret buying this shed off marketplace without viewing it first? Of courseвҖҰ (who wouldnвҖҷt after having the shed delivered rusty and falling apart)рҹӨҰвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ BUT in all honesty knowing me I probably would have still bought it anyway for the challenge рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷҖпёҸ Either way IвҖҷm stoked with how itвҖҷs turned out and IвҖҷve donned my crown as queen of rust рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҸӯрҹ’… It took 3 days to remove rust, 1 day to put up all the walls, 1 day to install the trusses and 2.5 days of combined painting and installing the wall, roof and door sheets вҖҰ. Not bad, maybe I should have built a shed house рҹҳқ

item.title: I have completed restoring and installing my shed! The transform...
item.description:
View on TikTok


I have completed restoring and installing my shed! The transformation from rusty junk to somewhat new looking shed is complete рҹӘ„вңЁ (I still need to install some lights, solar panels, etc and Reno down the track to an insulated space with a carport attachment )

item.title: What you may not realise is вҖҰ This whole owner builder journey...
item.description:
View on TikTok


What you may not realise is вҖҰ This whole owner builder journey IвҖҷm on was a massive risk, it was an all or nothing type deal. I risked everything I had to buy land in a town I had never been to and build a house on a tiny budget that was only possible if I did all the work myself. I took that risk knowing I had no experience, no idea what I was doing and not even a friend/family member I could turn to who was in the trades. I took that risk knowing my entire career had to be put on hold and that getting back into the industry and owning a business like I had may be near on impossible. I took that risk knowing my tiny home build budget may not be enough and I may never be able to afford to complete my dream house. I took that risk knowing my savings wouldnвҖҷt cover living costs and I would have to find a way to do that while building. The odds were against me, it was very reasonable to assume I would fail, I had family and friends tell me I was insane and itвҖҷs not possible. BUT I had a secret, I am my biggest cheerleader and IвҖҷm no gambling woman but I knew betting on myself and going all in was a sure deal. I am a huge believer in вҖҳthe greater the risk the greater the rewardвҖҷ and that you are in the control seat, directing your own life. Its a powerful thing to be able to set a vision of a future so clear that is already feels like itвҖҷs reality. To know and believe with your whole being that anything is possible, because of your own lived experience. The mind is a powerful entity that can work with you or against you, if you can learn to use your mind as a tool any ordinary person can achieve extraordinary things. But only if we remain kind to ourselves, kinder than the world or society can be, treat yourself like a toddler learning everyday stuff. There will be falls, fails and tantrums but thatвҖҷs okay give yourself a big cuddle and remind yourself that Rome wasnвҖҷt built in a day, you canвҖҷt grow a forest over night and we donвҖҷt come out of the womb running . Evolution of self is not easy but discipline is the key to freedom, and rememberвҖҰ вҖҰ вҖҳThe moment you doubt whether you can fly, you cease forever to be able to do it!вҖҷ

item.title: For those who were wondering what I was saying while I was insta...
item.description:
View on TikTok


For those who were wondering what I was saying while I was installing that shed вҖҰ now you donвҖҷt have to wonder рҹҳқрҹҳӮ Do all building sites sound like this? рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷҖпёҸ
